channel.title: morningNewsSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Teddi Mellencamp Says Doctor Declined to Prescribe GLP-1 Medication During Cancer Treatment
item.description: Television personality Teddi Mellencamp disclosed that her physician would not prescribe GLP-1 weight loss drugs while she was undergoing treatment for cancer.

item.title: Taylor Sheridan's Highly Rated Western Leaving Netflix in One Week
Gigi Hadid Shares Details of Bradley Cooper's Birthday Gesture on Her 31st
item.description: Model Gigi Hadid marked her 31st birthday on April 23, receiving an elaborate floral gift from partner Bradley Cooper among other celebrations.

item.title: Hailey Bieber Explains How Billie Eilish Ended Up Joining Justin Bieber at Coachella
item.description: Hailey Bieber revealed the behind-the-scenes coordination that led to Billie Eilish joining Justin Bieber on stage during his Coachella performance.

item.title: Divisive Hollywood Actor Continues to Win Over Skeptical Audiences
